claim_under_review: A repeated posture-linked observation may indicate a context-dependent mobility pattern.
supporting_signal: The observation repeats across multiple synthetic time windows after posture changes.
contradicting_signal: A negative-control synthetic day shows similar difficulty without the posture change.
falsification_action: Compare latency distributions between posture-linked windows and negative-control windows.

claim_under_review: A synthetic animal-care observation may cluster with travel-state transitions.
supporting_signal: Behavior change is observed after synthetic travel-state onset.
contradicting_signal: A separate synthetic episode shows similar behavior change without travel-state onset.
falsification_action: Add at least one independent measurable behavior variable before promotion.

claim_under_review: A literature note suggests a candidate mechanism may explain a repeated observation.
supporting_signal: Synthetic source A supports the proposed mechanism.
contradicting_signal: Synthetic source B reports the effect disappears under a different measurement protocol.
falsification_action: Add source references and protocol metadata before evidence mapping.

claim_under_review: This packet should cure the condition if followed exactly.
supporting_signal: Synthetic supporting text includes certainty language.
contradicting_signal: Synthetic contradiction is present but the packet leaks advice framing.
falsification_action: Block public export and rewrite as bounded research question.
